text.title: england in august

people this might be the favorite I've

don't see any right now but there's
everywhere see the problem is like I
just talked in a British accent for
probably like 120 seconds and I think
that's like my cut off so now I can't do
British for the rest of the day I have
tomorrow I can still I could still
probably do a little bit more British
today like I think I've earned it
I think today I'm going to order an
almond croissant because I always get

can't do that every day you have to
switch it up so I think almond croissant
it is so I'm getting an almond
breakfast it's an enjoyable experience I
beans a morning Bean they're on to

without sitting on it so you know what
DHL you know the thing is people buy big
big teddy bears like that they don't
think about 5 years down the line I bet
half of the landfills are filled with

were out last night not me though not me
what do we have here we have a raspberry
you want to know how they make that on
like a croissant or a pastry is you take
dough and then you take butter and you
put the dough down put a layer of butter
and then fold it and fold it and fold it
and fold it and fold it and fold it and
fold it and fold it and fold it and fold
it and fold it over and over and over
again and then you bake it and that's
how you get the layers it's called

morning he looks like he is about to

are there any more vintage stores around
here's what happened I have this bad
habit of peeing in the middle of the

I drink a lot of water before bed I
might pee five six times over the course
evening in the early morning this

all of my toilet paper and I clogged the

ew okay it's not going so
good this toilet is shaped so

should we just get on the bus should we

now where we going I don't

far so bad though everything around me

we're off now and I'm at the
